posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
We decided to move the deprecation of API version 2023-07 to January 15th, at 8am GMT. This is to account for new year holidays being observed in a many parts of the world. Changelog

The date change applies to all the updates that were originally scheduled for Jan 1st::

  • Version 2024-01 will be released for preview
  • Version 2023-07 will be deprecated
  • You will no longer get 2023-07 as the default version when sending a request without a header

We got feedback from our community (YOU) that the date was a bit risky, so we adjusted our plans accordingly

And even though this gives you a few more days to prepare, we still recommend starting the migration as soon as possible
